arabic_text:
صاحب مور
صاحب کور
صاحب دور
اختتام
شروعات
تدبیر
کائنات
english_text:
Master of Mor
Master of Kor
Master of Dor
End
Beginning
Governance (Tadbir)
Universe (Cosmos)
400,000
alt_text: Three concentric circles representing nested cosmic time-cycles, each labeled 400,000 (units). The outermost red circle is 'صاحب مور' (Master of Mor), with red dots marking 'اختتام' (End) and 'شروعات' (Beginning). The middle blue circle is 'صاحب کور' (Master of Kor). The innermost green circle is 'صاحب دور' (Master of Dor). At the very center is a black space/galaxy disc labeled 'کائنات' (Universe). Two large yellow arrows labeled 'تدبیر' (Governance/Tadbir) point inward from the rim toward the universe.
notes: Cosmic-time hierarchy diagram pairing with image 013. Three nested 400,000-unit cycles called Mor (outer), Kor (middle), Dor (inner), each with its own 'Sahib' (Master). Two streams of Tadbir (divine governance) flow inward to govern the Universe at the center.
